mapper.insert: INSERT INTO LOAN (BOOK_ID, MEMBER_ID, LOAN_DATE, STATUS) VALUES (#{bookId}, #{memberId}, NOW(), 'ACTIVE')
mapper.update: UPDATE BOOK SET STATUS = 'N' WHERE BOOK_ID = #{bookId}
mapper.select: SELECT L.LOAN_ID as loanId, L.BOOK_ID as bookId, B.TITLE as bookTitle, L.MEMBER_ID as memberId, U.NAME as memberName, L.LOAN_DATE as loanDate, L.RETURN_DATE as returnDate, L.STATUS as status FROM LOAN L JOIN BOOK B ON L.BOOK_ID = B.BOOK_ID JOIN USER_INFO U ON L.MEMBER_ID = U.MEMBER_ID WHERE L.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} ORDER BY L.LOAN_DATE DESC

SELECT L.LOAN_ID as loanId, L.BOOK_ID as bookId, B.TITLE as bookTitle, L.MEMBER_ID as memberId, U.NAME as memberName, L.LOAN_DATE as loanDate, L.RETURN_DATE as returnDate, L.STATUS as status FROM LOAN L JOIN BOOK B ON L.BOOK_ID = B.BOOK_ID JOIN USER_INFO U ON L.MEMBER_ID = U.MEMBER_ID ORDER BY L.LOAN_DATE DESC
